footer.tagline: AI solutions for SMEs — no risk, guaranteed results.

howItWorks.title: From idea to results in three steps

noCureNoPay.title: You only pay when it works

proposition.heading: No risk. No upfront investment. Just results.
proposition.point2: You define the success criteria together with us
proposition.point3: Pay only after verified, measurable results

overAIntern.title: AI that works for your business

story.heading: Our story
story.paragraph1: AIntern was founded with one mission: making powerful AI technology accessible and risk-free for SMEs. Too many business owners were losing time to repetitive tasks that AI could handle — but the barrier to entry felt high.
story.paragraph2: We built AIntern to change that. We analyse your processes, implement tailored AI solutions, and only charge you when the results are measurable and verified. No jargon. No large upfront investment. Just results.

vision.heading: Our vision
vision.text: Every SME deserves access to the same AI advantages that large corporations enjoy — without the complexity or the risk.

contact.heading: Ready to get started?
contact.subtext: Book a free, no-obligation intro call. We analyse your situation, identify the biggest opportunities, and show you exactly what AI can do for your business.

hero.headline: Spending too much time on tasks that could run automatically?
hero.subtext: AIntern uses AI to make your internal processes smarter — and you only pay when it works. No risk, real results.
